response_text:
ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR flight_status : varchar
ATTR scheduled_time : timestamp

ENTITY FlightLeg
PK flight_leg_id
ATTR flight_leg_id : varchar : PK
ATTR departure_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_time : timestamp
ATTR arrival_time : timestamp
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR airport_location : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Aircraft
PK aircraft_id
ATTR aircraft_id : varchar : PK
ATTR aircraft_model : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_first_name : varchar
ATTR crew_last_name : varchar
ATTR crew_role : varchar

ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR passenger_first_name : varchar
ATTR passenger_last_name : varchar

REL FlightLeg -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_id
REL FlightLeg -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL FlightLeg -> Flight : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_id
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Aircraft : 1 -> 1 : FK=aircraft_id
REL FlightLeg -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 0..N : FK=crew_id
